function I(I)return P[I-(-886218+910645)]end for I,v in ipairs({{613321+-613320,583954+-583652},{-707577+707578;620118-619872};{131928+-131681,-714770+715072}})do while v[847754+-847753]<v[415082+-415080]do U(z)end,function(P,I)local U=N(I)local m=function(m)return v(P,{m},I,U)end return m end return(r(8475117-(-723203),{}))(U(z))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(-656759-(-681275))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
